title: Archive obsolete repository artifacts phase1
objective:
Run script:
"""
archive_root = Path('governance/archive/bem532_20260517_phase1')
archive_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report = Path('governance/reports/bem532_archive_cleanup_phase1.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
manifest = archive_root / 'MANIFEST.md'
proof = Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem532_repo_archive_cleanup_phase1.txt')
proof.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
roadmap = Path('governance/tasks/pending/BEM532_REPOSITORY_ARCHIVE_CLEANUP_ROADMAP.md')
roadmap.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# Conservative archive policy: move only artifacts that are explicitly superseded, failed experiment leftovers,
# or pending tasks that already have done-marker equivalents. Do not touch active docs/workflows/state/protocols.
archive_candidates = []
reasons = {}

# 1. Obsolete failed Codex CLI / paid API experiment artifacts from BEM-522 path.
for folder in [Path('governance/codex/results'), Path('governance/codex/proofs'), Path('governance/codex/tasks')]:
    if folder.exists():
        for f in folder.iterdir():
            name = f.name
            obsolete_prefixes = [
                'bem522_real_selftest',
                'bem522_patch2_selftest',
                'bem522_patch3_selftest',
                'bem522_secret_refresh_selftest',
                'bem522_workflow_diag',
                'bem522_fix_runner',
                'bem522_gcloud_selftest',
                'bem524_p8_close_v3_short',
                'bem524_p8_pending_cleanup',
                'bem525_p9_roadmap_update',
                'bem526_p10_baseline_audit.txt'
            ]
            matched = False
            for pref in obsolete_prefixes:
                if name.startswith(pref):
                    matched = True
            if matched:
                archive_candidates.append(f)
                reasons[str(f)] = 'obsolete failed/superseded external-contour experiment artifact'

# 2. Pending task files with matching done marker or explicit archived status.
pending_dir = Path('governance/tasks/pending')
done_dir = Path('governance/tasks/done')
if pending_dir.exists():
    for f in pending_dir.iterdir():
        if f.is_file():
            done_equiv = done_dir / f.name
            text = f.read_text(errors='ignore')
            if done_equiv.exists() or 'ARCHIVED' in text or 'Status: completed' in text or f.name.startswith('BEM528_') or f.name.startswith('BEM529_'):
                archive_candidates.append(f)
                reasons[str(f)] = 'pending task superseded by done marker or marked completed/archived'

# 3. Explicit direct-patch request that is now historical after closure/run-script path.
for f in [Path('governance/tasks/pending/BEM524_P8_CLAUDE_DIRECT_PATCH_REQUIRED.md')]:
    if f.exists():
        archive_candidates.append(f)
        reasons[str(f)] = 'historical direct-patch request superseded by later closure state'

# Deduplicate while preserving order and avoid archiving current roadmap BEM531/BEM532.
unique = []
seen = set()
for f in archive_candidates:
    s = str(f)
    if s in seen:
        continue
    seen.add(s)
    if 'BEM531_INTERNAL_ROLE_CONTOUR_ROADMAP' in s or 'BEM532_REPOSITORY_ARCHIVE_CLEANUP_ROADMAP' in s:
        continue
    if f.exists() and f.is_file():
        unique.append(f)

moved = []
skipped = []
for src in unique:
    rel = src
    dest = archive_root / rel
    dest.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    if dest.exists():
        skipped.append(str(src) + ' -> destination exists')
        continue
    dest.write_text(src.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    src.unlink()
    moved.append((str(src), str(dest), reasons.get(str(src), 'obsolete/superseded artifact')))
    changed_files.extend([str(src), str(dest)])

# Repository inventory after archival.
summary = []
for root in ['governance/tasks/pending','governance/tasks/done','governance/codex/results','governance/codex/proofs','governance/reports','governance/protocols','governance/transport','governance/state','.github/workflows']:
    p = Path(root)
    count = 0
    if p.exists():
        for item in p.rglob('*'):
            if item.is_file():
                count += 1
    summary.append('- ' + root + ': files=' + str(count))

roadmap.write_text('# BEM-532 | Repository Archive Cleanup Roadmap\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 12:47 (UTC+3)\n\n## Цель\nОчистить репозиторий от устаревших файлов и записей внешнего и внутреннего контуров, не удаляя исторические доказательства: всё переносится в governance/archive.\n\n## Этапы\n1. Phase 1 — conservative archive cleanup: failed/superseded external-contour artifacts and stale pending tasks.\n2. Phase 2 — documentation reference cleanup: убрать ссылки на устаревшие Codex CLI/OpenAI API пути из активных документов, если они не являются историей.\n3. Phase 3 — internal contour preflight cleanup: перед BEM-531 удалить/архивировать устаревшие записи transport/state, не входящие в текущую curator-first архитектуру.\n4. Phase 4 — final cleanliness audit: inventory active vs archive, no stale pending, no obsolete blockers, no schedule, no issue #31.\n\n## Правило\nНичего не удалять без архива. Активные state/workflow/protocol/report files не трогать без точного основания.\n')
changed_files.append(str(roadmap))

manifest_lines = ['# BEM-532 Archive Manifest', '', 'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 12:47 (UTC+3)', '', '## Moved files']
if moved:
    for src, dest, reason in moved:
        manifest_lines.append('- ' + src + ' -> ' + dest + ' | reason: ' + reason)
else:
    manifest_lines.append('- none')
manifest_lines += ['', '## Skipped', '\n'.join(['- '+x for x in skipped]) if skipped else '- none', '', '## Inventory after phase1'] + summary
manifest.write_text('\n'.join(manifest_lines) + '\n')
changed_files.append(str(manifest))

report.write_text('# BEM-532 | Repository Archive Cleanup Phase 1\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 12:47 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\nПроведён консервативный аудит мусора и устаревших артефактов. Архивация выполнена только для явно superseded/failed/historical файлов.\n\n## Архив\n`governance/archive/bem532_20260517_phase1/`\n\n## Перемещено файлов\n' + str(len(moved)) + '\n\n## Manifest\n`governance/archive/bem532_20260517_phase1/MANIFEST.md`\n\n## Repository inventory after phase1\n' + '\n'.join(summary) + '\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
changed_files.append(str(report))

proof.write_text('BEM-532 phase1 archive cleanup completed. moved_files=' + str(len(moved)) + '. archive=governance/archive/bem532_20260517_phase1. blocker=null\n')
changed_files.append(str(proof))
ops_applied.append('archived obsolete/superseded artifacts and created archive cleanup roadmap')
"""
No issue comments.
